objective: Determine whether starting the supported LM Studio local server unblocks retained LFM2.5-VL live-validation preflight.

details: Observed LM Studio.app running while `lms server status` reported the local server was not running.
Started the server with the supported `lms server start` command; it listened on port 4521.
Re-ran the read-only VLM live-validation preflight while the server was running.
Stopped the server with `lms server stop` after the diagnostic because model visibility remained blocked.

commands.result: Success! Server is now running on port 4521
LM Studio PID 1921 listening on 127.0.0.1:4521 during diagnostic

commands.command: lms server stop && lms server status
commands.result: Stopped the server on port 4521. The server is not running.

decision.blocker: Starting the LM Studio local server succeeds, but retained LFM2.5-VL remains absent from `lms ls --json`; live validation is still blocked before inference.
decision.next_action: Do not run live `/v1/chat/completions` validation or promote runtime work until the retained VLM model key appears in `lms ls --json` and preflight reports ready_for_live_validation=true.
